{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212241404D70F159F241F078F113"}"},"total":32},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574463411893158718","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"🍅少见的女穿男多女主，好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763569383,"group_id":"7569265107251776537","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"欢迎大家评论与指出不足","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+4UXP52XvmnJYL6U+Vl/sCV8vYG0vwDrHv28bRo7rtn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"2922951154342862","user_name":"纸片人不用拉粑粑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2922951154342862","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7569265107251776537","book_info":{"abstract":"山间碎石滚落的声响还没消散，沈星眠只觉天旋地转，失重感瞬间将她吞噬。再次睁眼，柔软锦被贴着肌肤，鼻尖萦绕着清雅檀香，与山间草木味格格不入。
“少爷，您可算醒了！”丫鬟的惊喜喊声响起，沈星眠下意识应声，却被自己口中清朗的男声惊得浑身发麻。这不是她的声音！她猛地低头，素色锦袍覆着陌生宽肩，抬手便是双骨节分明的男子手掌。
她踉跄扑到铜镜前，倒抽冷气：镜中男子剑眉星目、清隽斯文，竟是位俊美公子。“我穿越了？还成了男的？”混乱中，原身记忆涌来——沈家独子沈星眠，刚成年就被宠成纨绔，终日吃喝玩乐，更有一妻一妾！
“夫君！”两道女声传来，房门推开，正室身着粉罗裙，眉眼温柔得能滴出水；小妾穿墨绿劲装，身姿挺拔自带霸气。两人一左一右靠近，满眼关切。
沈星眠吓得连连后退，双手乱摆：“你们别过来！”温柔正室脚步顿住，眼底泛起水光：“夫君，你这是讨厌我们吗？”霸气小妾也皱起眉，语气带着担忧：“你昏迷后怎么怪怪的？”
看着眼前风格迥异的妻妾，想到自己女大学生的身份，沈星眠欲哭无泪——穿成纨绔就算了，开局就要应付两个黏人妻妾，这日子该怎么过？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/145ee6df0c1210f6370a41a763fc7723~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"喜欢弹布尔的千山雪","author_id":"","book_id":"7569265107251776537","book_name":"女穿男，成了纨绔，娘子别盯着我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1393人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":474,"name":"日久生情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=474&name=日久生情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":454,"name":"可盐可甜","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=454&name=可盐可甜&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":471,"name":"契约婚姻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=471&name=契约婚姻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7569265413414978073","read_count":"1393","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1115625"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.4","serial_count":"257","tags":"古言脑洞,日久生情,古代言情,宠妻,可盐可甜,魂穿,契约婚姻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/145ee6df0c1210f6370a41a763fc7723~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288100&x-signature=ZcXPWzFH%2Fq%2BmFQAKdxY4ycPDXLk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"694489362208231","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel
